Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Jon G. Brooks, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lilian Rances, present, sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court takes the matter under submission.
